kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=API_SESSION, url=https://automationexercise.com/api, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=https://automationexercise.com/api/updateAccount path_url=/api/updateAccount headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '322'} body=b'{"name": "Inji Nuraliyeva", "email": "inji123@gmail.com", "password": "inji00", "title": "Mrs", "birth_date": "12", "birth_month": "April", "birth_year": "2004", "firstname": "Inji", "lastname": "Nuraliyeva", "company": "Andersen", "country": "Azerbaijan", "zipcode": "12345", "city": "Baku", "mobile_number": "987654321"}'
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: {'responseCode': 400, 'message': 'Bad request, email parameter is missing in PUT request.'}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
